case_title: SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION VS ODA BEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $763.10 FILED BY SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ODA BEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ODA BEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ODA BEN $763.10 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $804.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $210.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $11.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ODA BEN
